sentences.arabic: كَانَ الصَّحَابَةُ رِضْوَانُ اللهِ عَلَيْهِمْ نَمَاذِجَ حَيَّةً فِي الْإِخْلَاصِ وَالتَّضْحِيَةِ مِنْ أَجْلِ نَصْرَةِ هَذَا الدِّينِ الْمُبِينِ.
sentences.translation: Ashabi, radijallahu anhum, bili su živi primjeri iskrenosti i žrtve radi potpomaganja ove jasne vjere.
sentences.translationEn: The Companions, may Allah be pleased with them, were living examples of sincerity and sacrifice for the sake of supporting this clear religion.

sentences.arabic: وَيَذْكُرُ ابْنُ الْقَيِّمِ أَنَّ الْإِخْلَاصَ هُوَ مَاءُ الْعِبَادَةِ وَرُوحُهَا، وَبِدُونِهِ تَصِيرُ الْأَعْمَالُ كَالْجَسَدِ بِلَا رُوحٍ.
sentences.translation: Ibn el-Kajjim spominje da je ihlas (iskrenost) voda ibadeta i njegova duša, a bez njega djela postaju poput tijela bez duše.
sentences.translationEn: Ibn al-Qayyim mentions that sincerity (Ikhlas) is the water of worship and its soul, and without it, deeds become like a body without a soul.

sentences.arabic: وَمِنْ أَبْرَزِ الْأَمْثِلَةِ عَلَى ذَلِكَ مَوْقِفُ أَبِي بَكْرٍ الصِّدِّيقِ عِنْدَمَا أَنْفَقَ مَالَهُ كُلَّهُ لِوَجْهِ اللهِ.
sentences.translation: Jedan od najistaknutijih primjera toga je postupak Ebu Bekra es-Siddika kada je udijelio sav svoj imetak zarad Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: Among the most prominent examples of this is the stance of Abu Bakr as-Siddiq when he spent all his wealth for the sake of Allah.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ ثَبَتَ فِي الصَّحِيحِ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ قَالَ: «مَا نَفَعَنِي مَالٌ قَطُّ مَا نَفَعَنِي مَالُ أَبِي بَكْرٍ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي مَنَاقِبِ الصَّحَابَةِ].
sentences.translation: U Sahihu je potvrđeno da je Poslanik, s.a.v.s., rekao: 'Nikada mi ničiji imetak nije koristio kao što mi je koristio imetak Ebu Bekra' [bilježi Buhari u Poglavlju o vrlinama ashaba].
sentences.translationEn: It is established in the Sahih that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'No wealth has ever benefited me as the wealth of Abu Bakr has benefited me' [Reported by al-Bukhari in the Virtues of the Companions].

sentences.arabic: فَالصِّدِّيقُ لَمْ يَبْتَغِ بِذَلِكَ جَاهًا وَلَا سُمْعَةً، بَلْ كَانَ يَرْجُو مَا عِنْدَ اللهِ وَالدَّارَ الْآخِرَةَ.
sentences.translation: Es-Siddik time nije želio ugled niti reputaciju, već je žudio za onim što je kod Allaha i za budućim svijetom.
sentences.translationEn: As-Siddiq did not seek status or reputation through that, but rather he hoped for what is with Allah and the Home of the Hereafter.

sentences.arabic: هَكَذَا يَنْبَغِي لِلْمُؤْمِنِ أَنْ يَكُونَ دَائِمَ التَّفَقُّدِ لِنِيَّتِهِ فِي كُلِّ عَمَلٍ يَقُومُ بِهِ.
sentences.translation: Tako vjernik treba stalno preispitivati svoju namjeru u svakom djelu koje čini.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, a believer should always be checking his intention in every deed he performs.
